description_long: This shotgun features a robust black metal barrel and receiver, paired with a wooden stock and fore-end that display a rich brown finish. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a cylindrical profile and a simple front sight. The shotgun is equipped with a prominent drum magazine beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity design. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a standard trigger, while the full stock is ergonomically shaped for shoulder firing. The overall construction combines metal and wood, giving it a classic yet utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A black metal shotgun with a wooden stock and a drum magazine, featuring a short barrel and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, drum magazine, and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full wooden stock, black metal barrel, and the drum magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the wooden stock and the back of the drum magazine.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the wooden stock and metal barrel clearly visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with a simple front sight and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
